channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-18 09:44 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk: “It is impossible to become a multiplanet civilization without reusable rockets, just as ...
item.description: Elon Musk: “It is impossible to become a multiplanet civilization without reusable rockets, just as it would have been impossible to colonize America with expendable boats."

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX Dragon spaceship docking with the International@Space_Station
item.description: SpaceX Dragon spaceship docking with the International@Space_Station

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon + X a force for good after space livestream. We interviewed Gary Hoy who is using Grok for sale...
item.description: Elon + X a force for good after space livestream. We interviewed Gary Hoy who is using Grok for sales at Fortune 500 companies. We also interviewed Marie Hurabiell, who is running for Nancy Pelosi's seat in California's 11th Congressional district.xcancel.com/i/broadcasts/1OGwbljoB…

item.title: @elonmusk: How it is supposed to be
item.description: How it is supposed to be

item.title: @elonmusk: And major improvements coming to image/video generation accuracy
item.description: And major improvements coming to image/video generation accuracy

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk in new interview: "10 years from now, probably 90% of all distance driven will be driven b...
item.description: Elon Musk in new interview: "10 years from now, probably 90% of all distance driven will be driven by the AI in a self-driving car. It will be quite a niche thing in 10 years to actually be driving your own car." AI already drives for 90%+ of the miles I travel.

item.title: @elonmusk: Wokists are so narcissistic that they cannot understand that the Odyssey is more important to the ge...
item.description: Wokists are so narcissistic that they cannot understand that the Odyssey is more important to the general public than their concerns about political expediency. They feel they are the only ones who are entitled to feel offended. And they are offended by anything that doesn’t treat them as the centre of universe. They will even freak out about pronouns. They will start calling you a racist just to control you. They will start calling you an extremist because you don’t want your culture to be liquidated and disrespected. It is time for the silent majority, the non-woke, to start feeling very offended with woke culture and give it the treatment wokists have been giving us for more than a decade now.

item.title: @elonmusk: Basically every political instinct I had when I was a lib in 2015 ended up being completely wrong. E...
item.description: Basically every political instinct I had when I was a lib in 2015 ended up being completely wrong. Even in 2020, even after 4 years of being disabused of all sorts of bad ideas, all my remaining lib assumptions also ended up being totally, completely wrong. At some point you have to accept that you were the mark, that you were wrong about everything, laugh it off, and refuse to let sunk costs keep driving you off the same cliffs.

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 now has over a billion downloads
item.description: 𝕏 now has over a billion downloads
